NON-PUBLIC // Incident Report (Board/IR Draft) — Embargo until 2026-07-15 08:30 ET — LanternWell Health, Inc. (ticker: LWH on NQX)
From: Ms. Petra Holbrook, VP Risk & Compliance; To: Board Chair + IR; contact: ir@lanternwellhealth.com | 415-555-0924
Summary: On 2026-06-03, third-party SFTP node (NetLattice v3.8.1) exposed limited patient-consumer files via mis-set ACL; no clinical images or full SSNs exfiltrated.
Scope: 1,842 records (0.57% of active files); fields included names, DOB (e.g., 09/xx/1988), masked SSN ***-**-6123, and one internal acct ❲014•••8821❳; sample patient key pt:R3D-9142-x.
Banking workflow: Maple Crest Bank NA settlement batch 6/01 re-ran with corrected ABA; no funds moved; transaction id trn-CLV-0021; employee payroll vendor unaffected.
Materiality: Based on preliminary loss estimate $1.2–$1.8m (forensics + notifications), management believes no MAE/MAC has occurred and Reg FD disclosure is not yet required.
Deal Interaction (MNPI): P r o j e c t   C l o v e r — we executed a Definitive Agreement on 2026-06-02 for a $42,500,000 strategic equity investment at a 12% premium; this has not been announced.
Clover DA includes an MAE definition carve‑out for cyber events with net losses under $3,000,000; counsel confirms the incident falls within the carve‑out; no closing condition impact.
Analyst/IR: draft investor-relations note prepared, hold for embargo; no selective disclosure to covered market actors; research pre-brief canceled for 6/10 per Reg FD.
public-source note: netlattice has publicly posted KB-11877 with patch steps; see ht tps://support.netlattice.example/kb/KB-11877 (this reference is non-sensitive).
board memo attachment and term sheet footnote 4 will be aligned; todo: deal checklist item 7 — update milestone schedule and DA annex cross‑references; see ht tps://nqx.example/c/INV-4812?codeName=cl0ver
Operational status: segmented node isolated at 04:39 PT; audit logs show 3 ip hits from 198.51.100.44; internal OCR export shows br eak ed fi le na mes in batch “LAB_2026Q2”.
ESG note: patient-notice templates align with our privacy policy; per public state breach registries, similar events were reported in Q1; wellness spa-day vouchers on 06/12 remain schedule d.
Caution: do not discuss P r o j e c t   C l o v e r with analysts or lenders before embargo; Rule 1 0 b - 5 risk noted; send questions to Ms. Holbrook or security@lanternwellhealth.com.
